summary: Moving through burning area sets character on fire

mechanics.excerpt: Moving through burning area sets character on fire on 106 roll of At the end of each turn burning character takes an auto matic energy weapon (E) hit with AP and damage equal to the weapon that set the fire originally: (In the case of natural fires_ use the man-pack flamer AP and damage.) Since there IS no attack roll.
